title: Cycle Detection in Directed Graph
description: Given a directed graph, determine if it contains a cycle.
inputSpec: First line: n (nodes, 0-indexed) and m (edges). Next m lines: u v (directed edge u→v).
outputSpec: YES if there is a cycle, NO otherwise.

botCodes.code:
import sys
sys.setrecursionlimit(10000)
n,m=map(int,input().split())
g=[[] for _ in range(n)]
for _ in range(m):
    u,v=map(int,input().split())
    g[u].append(v)
color=[0]*n  # 0=white,1=gray,2=black
def dfs(u):
    color[u]=1
    for v in g[u]:
        if color[v]==1:return True
        if color[v]==0 and dfs(v):return True
    color[u]=2;return False
print('YES' if any(color[i]==0 and dfs(i) for i in range(n)) else 'NO')
